data.title: Application Layer Design
data.description: Instagram's application architecture uses a microservices model to allow scalability and independent feature deployment.
data.technical_spec: Built with Python/Django, updated with React Native for components.

data.title: Data Storage
data.description: Stores user data, multimedia, and interactions.
data.technical_spec: Relies on a combination of PostgreSQL for structured data and Cassandra or Redis for other data types.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes a CDN to deliver media quickly worldwide.
data.technical_spec: CDN services like Akamai or AWS CloudFront employed for global speed optimization.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Dynamically distributes incoming service requests across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using HAProxy or other proprietary solutions.

data.title: Fault Tolerance
data.description: Ensures app availability with minimal downtime.
